description_long: This shotgun features a robust design with a combination of wood and metal components, giving it a classic yet tactical appearance. The stock and fore-end are made of wood, providing a traditional look, while the receiver, barrel, and other functional parts are constructed from dark metal. The barrel is relatively short and fitted with a cylindrical suppressor or muzzle device, and a heat shield with venting is visible along the top. The receiver area includes a visible loading port and a box magazine, suggesting a magazine-fed mechanism. The overall build is compact, with ergonomic shaping for ease of handling in urban environments.
description: A compact, magazine-fed shotgun with a wooden stock and fore-end, dark metal receiver, and a vented barrel with a suppressor.
description_view_0: Front view showing the circular muzzle, suppressor, and the alignment of the barrel with the heat shield above.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the full length of the shotgun, wooden stock, box magazine, and vented barrel with suppressor.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the buttstock, pistol grip, and the symmetry of the receiver and barrel.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the wooden stock, box magazine, and the detailed receiver and barrel assembly.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel with vented heat shield and cylindrical suppressor
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized trigger guard with smooth edges and no visible finger grooves
